content: GitHub Actions Android KMP CI on ubuntu-latest: use actions/setup-java@v4 with java-version: '21' and distribution: 'temurin'. Use gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3+ for caching. Android SDK is pre-installed on ubuntu-latest. Write local.properties with sdk.dir pointing to ANDROID_SDK_ROOT to avoid 'SDK location not set' error. Build with ./gradlew :androidApp:assembleDebug for Android. For Go: use actions/setup-go@v5 with go-version from go.mod. GRADLE_OPTS: -Xmx4096M for memory.
